text.title: Figma vs Adobe Strategy 2026 Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed when applying figma-vs-adobe-strategy-2026. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Team picks Adobe because 'we know Photoshop'; loses 9 months of collaboration features.
antipattern.fix: Score on five axes; familiarity is at most one.

antipattern.symptom: Migration estimated as 'a sprint'; takes 4 months + library port.
antipattern.fix: Quantify component-library port + training + license overlap upfront.

antipattern.symptom: Decision frozen in 2024; both vendors shipped agent surfaces since.
antipattern.fix: 6-month revisit cadence + Config / Adobe MAX monitoring.

antipattern.symptom: Recommendation says 'has API' without naming endpoints; engineering finds gaps post-purchase.
antipattern.fix: Cite specific REST endpoints per requirement.
